prompt: In the style of an ornate illuminated manuscript, depict 'Wisdom Blooms' scripted in shimmering gold across a parchment texture, elegantly framed by beautiful decorative borders.
prompt_refined: Generate an image depicting 'Wisdom Blooms' in the style of an ornate medieval illuminated manuscript. The text is rendered in shimmering gold leaf script, centrally placed on a richly textured parchment background. The entire composition is elegantly framed by a highly detailed, intricate decorative border, featuring classic manuscript motifs like swirling vines and floral elements.
